cards.name: Common Slime
cards.description: A humble creature born from arcane runoff. Surprisingly difficult to get rid of.

cards.name: Forest Sprite
cards.description: Mischievous guardian of the ancient groves. Her laughter echoes where no path exists.

cards.name: Stone Golem
cards.description: Carved from the bedrock of forgotten mountains. Each step shakes the earth beneath.

cards.name: Wind Hawk
cards.description: Rides the currents between worlds. Its talons have caught lightning and held it fast.

cards.name: Shadow Wolf
cards.description: It does not hunt in darkness — it is the darkness. Pack of one, feared by many.

cards.name: Fire Dragon
cards.description: Ancient beyond reckoning. Its breath once melted a city into a lake of glass.

cards.name: Thunder Phoenix
cards.description: Reborn from every storm. Those who witness its rising do not speak of it twice.

cards.name: Void Serpent
cards.description: Older than the stars above. It remembers a universe before light was invented.
